title: ⚡ Major Performance & Code Overhaul
message: Big updates just dropped — here's what's new:

highlights: ⚡ Blazing Fast Load Times — The app's core code has been split into smaller, dedicated modules. Songs, Members, Dashboard, and Scheduling each now load independently, making everything snappier and more responsive.
🧩 Modular Architecture — App.tsx has been reduced by 75%. Songs, Members, and Dashboard now live in their own components, resulting in a cleaner and more maintainable codebase under the hood.
🎨 Shared Design Tokens — Role styles, status badges, and category colors are now centralized in a single constants file — ensuring visual consistency across every screen.

🛡️ Smarter Permission Logic — Member management permissions (Add, Edit, Delete) are now more granular and consistent: Leaders can add members, only Admins can delete, and everyone can edit their own profile.
🔄 Instant Member Updates — Member data now syncs with a smarter cache system built directly into the Members screen, so your list always reflects the latest data without full-page refreshes.
🖨️ Print-Ready Song Sheets — Print any song with clean, formatted lyrics and chords via the print button in the Song Detail view.
🐛 Deep-Link Fixes — Tapping a push notification for a new song now reliably opens the correct song, even if the app hadn't loaded yet.
📊 Dashboard for All Roles — Every team member can now access the dashboard with full card visibility.
🗂️ Dismissed Tab in Notes — Tag a note with 'Dismiss' to move it to its own tab, keeping Active clean.
🔀 Admin Note Reclassification — Admins can now move notes between Bug, Feature, and General with one tap.
✅ Song Form Validation — Missing required fields now show an error toast and auto-focus the first empty field.
🔔 Role-Switch Toast — Switching roles as QA Specialist now shows a toast instead of a floating pill.
🔒 Smarter Duplicate Detection — Songs with copied lyrics (even with added verses) are now correctly flagged.
⚡ Reaction Counts Fixed — Fast-clicking multiple reactions no longer resets counts.

🙏 Verse of the Day — A fresh NLT Bible verse now greets every team member at the top of the dashboard each day, with a heartfelt insight and cross-references. React with emojis (Praying, Love, Fire, Touched, Blessed, Worship) — your reactions are saved and visible to the whole team.

📊 Bento Dashboard for Everyone — All team members now see the same beautiful card-based dashboard layout, each tailored to their role. Leaders, Musicians, Audio/Tech, and Members each see what matters to them — cleanly and without clutter.
👋 Personalized Greeting — Your name and the time of day now appear above the Verse at the top of your dashboard. A small touch that makes the app feel more personal.
